name: C-17 compliance-remove blocks removal when --controls-file still cites the framework
command:
printf -- '- id: custom-framework
  url: https://x.com
' > cat.yaml && printf -- '- framework: custom-framework
  control_id: CC1.1
' > controls.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/compliance-remove.sh" custom-framework --catalog cat.yaml --controls-file controls.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'still cited' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
